title: Enforce corelib api-shape tier coverage in beskid_tests

source.subject: feat(analysis,tests): enforce corelib api-shape tier coverage in beskid_tests

body:
## What shipped

`beskid_tests` enforces api-shape tier coverage so new corelib APIs cannot ship without an assigned tier tag.

## Source commit

Repository **`compiler`** · commit `53487b3`

> feat(analysis,tests): enforce corelib api-shape tier coverage in beskid_tests

## Completed

2026-05-23 (catalog cutoff window).
